candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; cleaner and more standard than the combined/misaligned 'Net sales Operating expenses' row.
Candidate appears to be a malformed/combined label and is less semantically precise than 'Total Revenue'.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue. 'Total Revenue' is preferred; the combined label is retained only as a fallback because it carries identical values and may reflect a label change/parsing issue.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production input costs; appears to be the primary cost-of-sales component.
Could be part of direct production/service delivery costs, but may also include overhead or outsourced services; less certain than raw materials.

variables.notes: Candidate list was empty. Selected from full A-column labels. 'Raw Materials and Supplies' is the clearest COGS-like line, but there is some risk that 'Other External Costs' also contains direct costs. Manual review recommended to confirm whether reported gross cost of sales should include additional components.

candidates.why: Classic operating overhead component and preferred SG&A component.
Operating overhead bucket; acceptable SG&A component and not a total row.
May represent external service/administrative costs; plausible overhead component though somewhat ambiguous.
Combined/malformed row and not a valid SG&A component; should not be used for XSGA.
Headcount metric, not an expense row; not valid for XSGA.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected best overhead components and excluded totals/balancing items, COGS ('Raw Materials and Supplies'), depreciation, amortization, impairments, and finance items.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense; should be excluded from XRD expense mapping.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization/impairment, not current R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing row, not an expense.

variables.notes: No clear current-period R&D expense line is present in the provided statements. Supplemental amortization and balance-sheet R&D asset rows do not qualify as XRD expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct match for interest expense and preferred per instructions.
Interest-related but narrower subset than total interest expense; useful fallback only.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, narrower subset and less preferred.
Specific component, not the main reported interest expense line.
Too broad/other finance costs, not specifically interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Using a priority list. Prefer the main interest expense line; lease interest is included only as a fallback if the main line is missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which is preferred to avoid double counting with MIB.
Broad equity total including non-controlling interests; only fallback if owner/parent equity were unavailable.
Balancing row, not preferred.
Balancing row, not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total assets/equity+liabilities, not book equity.
Income statement earnings line, not balance-sheet equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent

variables.notes: Selected parent/owner equity to exclude non-controlling interests, consistent with BE + MIB construction.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet NCI line and preferred for MIB.
Equivalent balance-sheet label; useful fallback if label changes by year.
Income statement attribution of earnings, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Income statement line, not the balance-sheet MIB stock.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests Earnings per ordinary share
candidates.why: Not a balance-sheet minority interest line.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list to capture possible label variation without double counting.
